name: Maxton
description: Thirteen rounds of strict pull-ups, box step-ups, and burpees — a high round count that turns a modest per-round combo into a long grind.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/maxton (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09; official Rx includes a 20 lb (men) / 14 lb (women) weight vest
